entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 Release - CMP-24566 - Import not working with...
entry.content:
Hi @CSmith,

I have all the permissions setup correctly, but still receiving the same error.

I raised an incident in the SAP SF support and they got back to me saying it is a known issue and the product team is working to fix it.

I will wait until I receive a fix on this.

Thank you.

entry.title: Characters limitation when using Georgian Unicode text
entry.content:
Besides the field character standard limitation, when using Georgian Unicode text (maybe other Unicodes have the same issue) character capability is even lower than the standard. For example, the latest goal management allows 2000 characters for the description field, but when using Georgian Unicode this number is even lower. Same for the job responsibility name.

If there is a standard solution, or if there are any changes planned, or if there is a workaround?

thanks,

Best Regards

entry.title: Cannot create a Single-date Order ECO using a custom OData service
entry.content: In SAP Business ByDesign (byD), the OData Editor allows the creation of Custom OData Services. We are trying to create a new Engineering Change Order of type Single-date Order using a custom OData service but it is always failing. We have isolated the problem in a smaller custom OData service but the problem is still the same. We are able to create a Standard Order (so the service works) but if the creation of a Single-date Order is attempted, it is failing because the StartDate is required. Trying to add the StartDate into the custom OData service does not work: trying to call the service does not create the new ECO. Is there a way to create a Single-date Order ECO using a custom OData service?

entry.title: Re: CORS status error REST API Sap Build Apps
entry.content: Hi, how can I solve this problem (CORS -Does the server allow CORS?status: undefined) when I want to use the AI Core API or any other API which is available in the SAP SAP Business Accelerator Hub?

entry.title: Re: GTS- No data available to request vendor-based LTVDs
entry.content: Hi Naveen, did you find a solution? We have the same problem and I can´t find a solution.

entry.title: Different kind of message in automatic credit control (OVA8) in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
I'm facing the following problem in credit management: 

The customer is demanding:

- An error message per step 010 that checks credit limit in the checking rule

- A warning message per step 020 that checks maximum document value

but the kind of message only can be set up in risk class and is unique for all checking...

Anyone knows if there is a way to cover this demmanding?

Thanks in advance and best regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud 2000 rows limit
entry.content: Is this up to date?

entry.title: Re: Alias Table in Database View
entry.content: You cannot use ABAP database views in ABAP database views, according to the editor. So how did you manage to do that?

entry.title: Inventory Procedure With a Modified SKU
entry.content:
An interesting problem. Looking for a more effective solution.

We keep inventory of blank drinking glasses. Some of these glasses get logo'd though a 3rd party vendor. Usually it's in and out, but a minority are inventoried. All current logo glasses have there own unique sku that identifies it as a specific logo glass. 

There is an additional cost to these logo glasses. 

- Currently we have a main number (blank glasses).

- We issue purchase orders to the third party vendor that does the logo job. 

We manually do inventory adjustments once the finished logo glasses come in (deduct from main sku / increase specific logo glass sku). 

Any suggestions how these can be automated better, keeping in mind that costs need to be accurately factored in ?  

We are using SAP B1.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Standard report to display char. attributes
entry.content: Can you provide me the FS & TS for this report

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content: I was able to fix the error mentioned in my previous comment by editing the EDMX file (removing one schema).

entry.title: Expanding Our Horizons: SAP's Build-Out and Datacenter Strategy for SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
We are excited to announce details about our commitment to expanding our SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) global footprint.

As a part of our datacenter and deployment strategy, we are working to make SAP BTP available to more locations and businesses worldwide. With this step, we enable SAP’s business applications to consume modern technology services across the globe – like enabling intelligent business processes by embedding AI-based scenarios, making BTP even more accessible for our customers and partners.

We plan to expand SAP BTP availability into 10+ new datacenter regions by the end of 2025 based on the collaboration with our infrastructure partners.

This current plan includes new BTP regions in Israel, Brazil, Australia, Japan and Saudi Arabia. Further details on additional locations and timeframes will be announced soon. Please also check our Road Map Explorer for details.

 "As we embark on a journey to broaden our SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) footprint worldwide, we are dedicated to increasing the availability of our data centers. By offering SAP BTP in more locations, we enhance its appeal to customers and partners, enabling intelligent global business processes through seamless integration.”
Dr. Michael Ameling, Executive Vice President  & Chief Product Officer of SAP Business Technology Platform 

In addition to the expansion into new datacenters, we are also increasing the regional availability of SAP BTP applications and services within the existing SAP BTP locations, and align services’ availability between the different geographical regions.

You will soon be able to consume our flagship SAP BTP solutions from a local datacenter in every country that offers an SAP BTP presence:

  • SAP Integration Suite
  • SAP BTP, ABAP Environment
  • SAP Build Code
  • SAP Build Process Automation
  • SAP Build Work Zone
  • SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP Datasphere and
  • SAP Analytics Cloud 

We are committed to enabling businesses to run at their best, across the globe. This expansion of SAP BTP is a significant step towards that commitment, allowing us to serve our customers and partners better and bring the power of SAP BTP to new markets. We look forward to sharing more updates on this exciting journey with you!

entry.title: 7KE1 Plan / Costs / Revenues
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Looks like 7KE1 / 2 / 3 / X is not valid anymore in our S/4 New Version (Function is not available).

Do you have any input on that?. What s the alternative to fill revenues & expenses forecast by Profit Center / Cost Center / General Account ?

Thanks for your lights!!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA and SAP CX Integration Overview
entry.content:
Hello Alex Shipilov,

what is the picture about integration scenarios

1. SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Sales+Service)

2. SAP CX Sales and Service Cloud Version 2

3. SAP Field Service Management

Any official blog including process/data flows like the one you already provided regarding this updated application scenarios?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards

Marco
